steps.title: Track opposing feelings
steps.content: The shop owner fumes that the new picture does not belong in the shop, but the passage then says he is secretly proud of it. The purpose is to show both reactions at once.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: Choice B focuses on resentment toward the seller, which the passage does not show. Choice C says the text ranks prized items. Choice D asks for differences, but the picture itself is not described in detail. The remaining purpose matches the owner's mixed feelings. The answer is A.
